results.title: 3 biggest reasons why India lost England series
results.description: IND vs ENG, a moment of silence (Source: BCCI) India, ranked number one in the ICC ODI Rankings, suffered a disappointing 2-1 series defeat to England. Going 1-1 into the decider, the two-time World Cup-winning side suffered a 27-run defeat after the hosts scored 387 runs in the first innings. This ends a terrible tour [...]
results.source: Bj Sports - Cricket Prediction, Live Score

results.title: Assam: Tea Association of India expresses concern over flooding in Sivasagar's Nazira Sub-Division
results.description: Sivasagar (Assam) [India], July 20 (ANI): The Tea Association of India (TAI), Assam Branch, has expressed deep concern over the unprecedented flood situation that has severely affected the tea-growing areas of Nazira Sub-Division in Sivasagar District following incessant rainfall and a cloudburst in the adjoining State of Nagaland. results.title: India to play four-day practice match ahead of Sri Lanka Test series
results.description: India to play four-day practice match ahead of Sri Lanka Test series (Photo by Prakash Singh/Getty Images) India will begin their preparations for the upcoming two-match Test series against Sri Lanka with a four-day practice match before the opening Test in Galle.
